response.justification: While the candidate has extensive overall software development experience and strong communication skills, they critically lack the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience on the Windows platform. Furthermore, there is no evidence of C++ experience combined with the required Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain knowledge, which are core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (13+ years).
Demonstrated strong communication and teaching abilities through workshops and talks.
Proficiency in modern development practices including CI/CD and TDD.
concerns: Very limited (approx. 6 months) and dated professional C++ experience, far below the 5-10 year requirement.
No explicit evidence of C++ development experience on the Windows platform.
Lack of direct Fixed Income/Derivatives experience or C++ combined with Capital Markets domain.
